headline: CHIPOTLE KICKS OFF SUMMER'S BIGGEST TOURNAMENT WITH ITS FIRST-EVER MATCHDAY BOGO FOR FANS WEARING SOCCER JERSEYS
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) is bringing soccer fandom to its restaurants across the U.S., Canada and U.K. this summer with its first-ever Matchday BOGO. On June 11, after 3 p.m. local time, fans wearing a soccer jersey to Chipotle restaurants can score a buy-one-get-one (BOGO) free entrée,1 while celebrating this summer's premier international soccer tournament.
